sn11.25:1.0.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. There the Blessed One said this:
sn11.25:1.0.2: v.945"‘Do not let anger overpower you;Do not become angry at those who are angry.Nonanger and harmlessness always dwellWithinthe hearts ofthe noble ones.Like a mountain avalancheAnger crushes evil people.’"
